ios.name: Teladoc Health
ios.description:
Teladoc Health connects you with complete care, at your convenience and an affordable cost. You’ll find what you need to get well—like 24/7 care—alongside primary care, therapy and programs proven to keep you well.

EXPERIENCE AND EXCELLENCE
Teladoc Health has been modernizing healthcare since 2002. More than 50 million visits later, we are the leader in telemedicine. With our app, top-quality doctors and data-driven programs are just a tap away.

SEAMLESS CARE FOR ALL OF YOU
Our app brings toge

reviews.title: Track
reviews.text: When I had Livongo, it gave me a scale which connected to your app and would keep track of weight gain or loss

reviews.title: A joke
reviews.text: Registered, sent request. estimated wait time 10-15 mins. At about 50 mins of waiting patiently, I received a text saying it was cancelled. No call, no missed call. Nothing

reviews.title: Great for Doctors. Not For weight and BP Management
reviews.text: Why bother setting up Face ID if it’s gonna ask me every time? Doesn’t have a good database of foods like Factor.

reviews.title: Awesome but glitchy
reviews.text: When I go to upload meals, the app shuts down.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: No wait. Professional and quick.

reviews.title: The app has short term memory loss
reviews.text:
I have been using this app for a week and every time I open it it has failed to open with Face ID and I have to plug in my username and password, which then triggers the prompt asking if I want to use Face ID. 
Every time I click “yes”, it says good job, I use the app and then the next time I open it up again, well, what do you know-it’s that same stuff as before. 
Very frustrating.

I want to know WHY I cannot access my glucose readings, weight charts, steps, and blood pressure readings any more? Now all it does is show for care and dermatology. Thats fine and good but not what I want and no clear visible way to get to the information I need. I tried to go through the coaching and it wouldn't do anything. I tried opting out of notifications/communications - still nothing. Whatever update ya’ll called yourself doing is very frustrating trying to go thru it or navigate away from it to get what I need

reviews.title: Almost there
reviews.text:
I’ve been using the app for some time. But only in the last month have I needed to use it regularly with my insurance. I do enjoy how it is intuitive (most of the time) and seems to sync well with other health apps and the scale. 

Biggest issue thus far is the Goal Setting. I’ve yet been able to complete it because it hangs up on step 1 or 2. I’ve gotten an overall goal. But I have no clue what step 3 and 4 are. 

There’s no “Next” as it’s all times with the animation. But the animation’s tips and I’m stuck.

Waited. Started over. Uninstalled. Not sure what else to try. 

Outside of that, it serves a solid purpose.

reviews.title: Great time saver
reviews.text: Using the app for a quick treatment for my allergies were great. The next day available in my primary doctor were for 3 weeks from today.

reviews.title: Great visit!!!
reviews.text: Good visit! Good results!!!!

reviews.title: I love teledoc!
reviews.text: Super helpful and thoughtful. I never knew I could have a good experience seeing a doctor virtually. Thank you for helping to heal me!

reviews.title: Always available!
reviews.text: Love the attention to care

reviews.title: Gimmick
reviews.text: They advertise availability of care programs (Livongo) with insurance companies and require you to share personal information before denial of participation as part of your care plan eligibility. Don’t fall for it.

reviews.title: Trash app returns to the login screen when you navigate away.
reviews.text:
This is unusable as I can’t copy and paste passwords from another app without the entire registration process resetting when returning to this piece of garbage.

Also it doesn’t permit apple passwords  to auto populate contact information. And their cancerous website doesn’t allow pasting passwords in safari. So you can’t generate a secure password and then paste it into the account create fields. I can only suspect that my employer signed us up for this service out of spite.

reviews.title: No test calls for spam filters or referral process
reviews.text: Spam filters caught every call. Give a test the number service. There is also no process for finding doctor deferrals.

reviews.title: Not good
reviews.text:
Not very good service 
AI is responding in French , I don't speak French

reviews.title: Difficult
reviews.text:
This app is not intuitive.  It irritates me that I have to search to enter foods.  This option should be easily recognizable on my dashboard.  Because it is hard to find and food logging is extremely slow, I don’t do it. I do like that I have a record of my BP and weight automatically loaded onto the app as well as daily exercise/steps.
Teladoc was offered to me by BC/BS for prediabetes management.  Overall, I am finding it unsatisfactory.

reviews.title: A+ Service
reviews.text: This app works so well and is so user friendly. Access to care is simple and expedient.

reviews.title: Not 24/7 Very slow providers
reviews.text: It says its 24/7 but the time waits is longer than 24/7!

reviews.title: Teladoc scammed me.
reviews.text: I called about a sharp pain in my throat that was getting worse and worse and they said "take Advil" which I told them I was already doing that and they said "take more" literally told me to take 3,600mg a day for a week and then "call back." Charged me $60 for that bogus advice and when I called to complain they acted like I was crazy for thinking they should give me my money back.

reviews.title: Don’t bother for sick note
reviews.text: They give you some generic note that doesn’t even has the physicians point of contact. Chat gpt wouldn’t even generate such trash

reviews.title: Karen
reviews.text: Friendly and quick. I would recommend this service.

reviews.title: Everyone should be using TelaDoc
reviews.text: I have use them for years. Mostly for pink eye, skin rash issues, and sometimes just general health concerns. it has saved us time and money. Very easy to use. And the best part is when you are away from home (vacation or travel) and one of your kids has something pop up, you can just go on the app and speak to a medical professional that has your kids medical history. They can also help locate the closest pharmacy.

reviews.title: Not use a friendly
reviews.text: Very difficult to add a picture once the visit has started. And very difficult to add a father to an authorized user list.

reviews.title: Last time using
reviews.text: Rude care provider

reviews.title: Exceptional customer service
reviews.text: Evelyn is a kind professional caring and very helpful customer service agent!

reviews.title: Stupid and full errors
reviews.text: It was built to make care accessible to you, but it is full of errors no support in there to make getting care even harder. Avoid.

reviews.title: He cares
reviews.text: This doctor listens to his patients and he cares.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: The doctors are always so amazing. They listen to you and they take care of you right away. My wait time is never long and they always make you feel like you’re actually right there with them.

reviews.title: Dr Harris
reviews.text: Dr Harris was amazing. After a frustrating day from a previous visit, he solved all my problems. He read all the notes prior to our call (I didn’t have to give rehash my story for the 5th time today) and reassured me right away that he would fix my issue. Thank you!

reviews.title: Bad.
reviews.text: Almost every time I try to use this app I get the “server error” message when it tries to load and most of the time when it does load, half of the options in the main menu simply aren’t there. I try to refresh multiple times and nothing changes. I close the app and reopen it and it fixes nothing. It also doesn’t ask me to sign back in after closing the app and reopening, which I find odd. I have updated the app and nothing is fixed. This is so frustrating because my insurance requires I use the app to continue having my medications covered, but the thing hardly ever works!

reviews.title: Love this option
reviews.text: I feel so lucky that employer provides Teledoc free of charge. I’ve used it for muscle pains and even a dental infection. Every doctor has been kind and attentive. App works great to get you in the queue.

reviews.title: Phone never rang
reviews.text: I have been waiting for my phone to ring and it never rang. No missed call. And they cancelled my appointment

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.text: Teladoc is super user friendly and makes seeing a doctor extremely convent especially with busy schedules. Thank you guys for all you do !!!!

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.text:
I received substandard care. Had to pay again to get the care I needed. 
I HIGHLY DON'T RECOMMEND USING THIS COMPANY CONSIDERING THE CARE AND SERVICE I RECEIVED. 
The doctor that consulted with me gave me a prescription of the weakest strength. 
Additionally their doctor was supposed to call in two prescriptions but only called in one. Once I found that out I tried to get ahold of someone at Teladoc prescription center and it kept going to voicemail. I left 4 messages but no one ever bothered to call me back. 
Then I PAID again with a different company, I was treated by a second doctor which I had to pay again for they told me that the prescription written was not adequate. 
I actually needed 4 medications and now I'm starting to feel better.

reviews.title: Teladoc Is the Best thing since sliced bread!
reviews.text: I absolutely love TELADOC!!!!  I can’t believe how freaking great this is! No sitting in a waiting room with sick people and getting what they have or spreading what I have. These doctors and people are FABULOUS! Makes everything better!

reviews.title: Too many clicks
reviews.text: So cumbersome to complete anything.  Nobody has time to go through a clunky user interface that has 15 screens to complete one task.  Several other apps are eons ahead of this.

reviews.title: Review
reviews.text: A+

reviews.title: Unsatisfied
reviews.text: De. Very rude and just hung up in my face

reviews.title: Great visit
reviews.text: Doctor was very friendly… very convenient. Nice not having to go into the office with other sick kids. Highly recommend this app.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The doctors are so caring and supportive! I highly recommend

reviews.title: Crooks
reviews.text: They charged me $89 for a call to tell me they can’t help me and to go to urgent care. Less than a minute phone call with no help, cost $89. Ridiculous, highway robbery.

reviews.title: Doctor
reviews.text: She was amazing!!!

reviews.title: Doctor to patient
reviews.text:
Very accommodating.
Pays attention to every detail and he’s the kind of doctor that is straight and forward in addressing your concerns.

reviews.title: Great video visit
reviews.text: Md was very polite. Listened to my concerns and provided seamless care. Very grateful

reviews.title: Worthless
reviews.text:
Having Livango app for ever, was sad to see them partnership with Teledoc.
Implemented the change over on a holiday, and just a day before the weekend, knowing that there would be issues. Waited for over a week to hear back from their customer service.
Will greatly miss the Dietitians at Livango that helped me out.

reviews.title: Clunky!!
reviews.text: App is so clunky. The food log is horrible. They finally allow you to link with a CGM but it took forever. The scale is off by 3 lbs. they have tasks to complete but no way to record the results such as heart rate, fitness, etc. what good is that if you can’t see progress over time?

reviews.title: Waited hours for a doctor and was never seen
reviews.text: Waited hours for a doctor and was never seen

reviews.title: Wow
reviews.text: Literally terrible. Doctors are lazy on here and the app is always glitching. These reviews must be fake because this app sucks lol.

reviews.title: Thanks Dr. Mirch!
reviews.text: Quick and easy, thanks for a smooth visit!

android.name: Teladoc Health
android.description:
Teladoc Health connects you with complete care, at your convenience and an affordable cost. You’ll find what you need to get well—like 24/7 care—alongside primary care, therapy and programs proven to keep you well.

EXPERIENCE AND EXCELLENCE
Teladoc Health has been modernizing healthcare since 2002. More than 50 million visits later, we are the leader in telemedicine. With our app, top-quality doctors and data-driven programs are just a tap away.

SEAMLESS CARE FOR ALL OF YOU
Our app brings toge

reviews.text: quick and efficient

This app charged me over $140 just to hear someone tell me that they cant prescribe antibiotics over the phone for epididymitus infection and they insisted on trying to sell me overpriced aleve or naproxen (nsaid pain reliever)even though i said no to it because the copay was higher than ones online and i didnt need them because they dont cure anything.I have no clue what good this app can do besides weight diet tracking etc.
very easy

they give you the impression that they can treat and help you with all these things but once you pay for there services there going to send you some where else so you can again pay for a doctor to actually treat you. 3 weeks ago they gave me a prescription that didn't work and today it's not there problem that it didn't help or made it worse infact
I love this service!
Even after updating, the app still won't allow me to properly edit my medications. Also wouldn't process my insurance info
so far, so good
incredible service I'm really impressed by how this works for myself I'm definitely going to use it again All the time.
Great goal setting app
Although the app is technically useable, it is extremely unreliable and difficult to navigate. many steps must be repeated due to glitches.
Awaiting my visit call but thus far, so easy and convenient, especially being sick, not really up to having to go sit at the urgent care
easy to set up hoping for pleasant experience
great service
fast & easy
excellent service when needed for a refill of meds when primary doctors are not available!
wouldn't let me continue my registration
fast and great care

Adding food in the app is an absolute nightmare. Extremely non user friendly, no ability to favorite or copy meals from a previous time, and over half the time I try to scan a barcode it says no food found, even on barcodes I've successfully scanned at one point. It's a huge part of what I need it for which makes it basically completely useless to me.
When it works it's great but the area to log weight, food and blood pressure keeps disappearing and until an alarm I've set to remind me to log something goes off I can do anything. Sucks.
not bad, pretty good 👍

it makes you feel a bunch of random BS that is not actual health questions or anything of that sort makes you type in a password 17 times and then when you get to the mental health one that you're trying to find out you fill out four questions and when you get to the end you don't qualify
can someone tell me where the track steps card is? Also, can not set weight goal. no radio button for that either. thanks
Slow, buggy, limited features. Constantly having to reach out to support for basic functions.
Fast Responses

the app works and is easy to use, however I have been having issues with trying to add my child to my account. Haven't tried doing that in a few months so next time I think about it I will come back and edit my review.
amazing 👏 love it really convenient at your own time and place, great staff
So easy and convenient!
very fast and easy to use
very convenient and easy 👌
Great doctors and services but the app is very glitchy and video calls often disconnect. Personally the great services and doctors outweigh the shortfalls of the app.
Fast and easy to use.
quick appointments with fast prescriptions. Phone appointments are always fast & easy
scam to be honest. they don't prescribe anything. you'll have to wait and make another appointment so they are double charging and useless.
does not have all the option required to move on the the next page when signing up
easy to use and can schedule a future appointment
Excellent

Customer service on the phone was excellent but this app was less than stellar. Just not up to par in terms of a user-friendly experience and you encounter many glitches as you proceed. I needed help from customer service as a result.
easy to follow prompts and smooth operations
Fast and very convenient!
excellent service
way too difficult to re-enter all information
Easy to use, quality care.
way better than diving a doctor with availability. saves me hours, and quick results
Easy way to get care
convenient for simple scripts
Process was easy and straightforward. Docs have been awesome. Highly Recommend! Will Use again. 5 stars.
Quick way to see a doctor if your child has a stomach ache, no reason to wait in a lobby of other sick people but you need a doctor's note for school.
i always get exceptional care.
time consuming
Simple, fast, easy care.
